title: Forbes (magazine) - Wikipedia
body: Redirect to: Forbes From currently unnecessary disambiguation : This is a redirect from a page name that has a currently unneeded disambiguation qualifier . Examples are: Jupiter (planet) Jupiter (unnecessary parenthetical qualifier) Paris, France Paris (unnecessary comma-separated qualifier) Japanese Bobtail cat Japanese Bobtail (unnecessary natural qualifier) Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages is a subcategory of this rcat's category. So this rcat should not be used on mainspace disambiguation redirects with "(disambiguation)" in the page title. Use {{ R to disambiguation page }} instead .
